Fixed 54 pre-existing stale/regression test failures: Alpha 10 files (source-inspection updates), Beta 5 files (TARE config + go_to_waypoint mocks) + 1 production fix (engine.vgg_execute clear_abort), Gamma 1 production fix (scene_graph_viz.py _build_object_markers re-enabled). Dispatcher: LookSkill regression restored + L4_patrol architecturally obsolete skip
Round 3 harness: 1349 passed / 41 failed / 6 skipped. All 41 bulk-failures are MuJoCo instance-leak pollution (confirmed by isolation runs). 0 real regressions. Ready for AC6 CEO manual test
AC6 manual test FAILED — V-Graph still 0 nodes after Phase A fix. Entered Phase B: read FAR C++ source, added rate-limited printf instrumentation to TerrainCallBack + MapHandler

Diagnostic run localized drop: neighbor_obs_indices_ populated with 2205 cells by UpdateRobotPosition, then silently pruned to 8 cells by ObsNeighborCloudWithTerrain (called from UpdateTerrainHeightGrid). Root cause: vehicle_height=1.0 in indoor.yaml caused TraversableAnalysis robot_terrain_init gate to fail (looks for terrain at robot.z-vh ≈ -0.72m, but floor is z=0). flat_terrain_cloud_ cleared to (0,0,0) dummy → kdtree only matches cells near world origin

Set vehicle_height=0.3 (matches go2_vnav_bridge ground_z offset). Verified: neighbor.size 8→225, total_out 0→925. Hit latent SIGSEGV in contour_detector.h::SaveCurrentImg (nh_->get_logger() on uninitialized shared_ptr). Fixed by replacing with std::cout

V-Graph Initialized. 70-75 global vertices, 131 visibility edges, cross-room edges confirmed (kitchen_door ↔ living_door through hallway). /tmp/far_contour_imgs/*.tiff now show wall/furniture outlines (84% non-zero). Post-cleanup regression: 173/173 V-Graph tests pass
DEBUG.md written with full OBSERVE/HYPOTHESIZE/EXPERIMENT/CONCLUDE trace. Learned pattern saved to ~/.claude/skills/learned/far-vgraph-pipeline.md. Instrumentation removed. Ready to commit
